events.comment: Baseline metadata for the whole resilience drill: network, accounts, services, and runtime mode.
Confirms the public prepare service is reachable before any live requests begin.

events.stage_summary: Finality watcher health and startup state.
events.comment: Shows watcher auth, verification policy, durable store backend, and startup recovery status.
Confirms receipt reads are available before trust-state assertions begin.
Confirms audit search and proof-chain reads are available before the drill uses them.

events.stage_summary: Creates the live schema used by this drill.
events.comment: Administrative preparation step so all later single and batch submissions share one schema baseline.

events.stage_summary: Creates the single-submit policy for live tests.
events.comment: Administrative preparation step that enables the main single-request path used in the drill.

events.stage_summary: Creates the batch-submit policy for live tests.
events.comment: Administrative preparation step that enables the batch-request path used at the end of the drill.
Checks that the public ingress API returns a usable single action while keeping debug material redacted by default.

events.stage_summary: Single prepare with debug material enabled.
events.comment: Checks the optional debug surface and shows the canonical form returned when explicitly requested.
Checks that batch preparation returns hashes and prepared actions without exposing raw derivation material by default.

events.stage_summary: Batch prepare with debug material enabled.
events.comment: Shows the optional batch debug material such as leaf hashes and manifest derivation outputs.
Negative test proving ingress validation blocks malformed requests before they reach chain or watcher logic.

events.stage_summary: Ingress auto-registers the request in watcher.
events.comment: Checks the convenience path where ingress prepares a request and immediately hands it off to finality tracking.
Confirms the request created by ingress handoff is already persisted in the watcher store.

events.stage_summary: Prepare a request used only for failure-state checks.
events.comment: Sets up an isolated request that will be registered, failed, and queried through receipt and audit surfaces.

response.error: watcher mutation endpoint requires valid auth token

events.comment: Negative test proving mutation endpoints are protected and cannot be called anonymously.
The same request succeeds once the caller presents the watcher auth token.
Shows that repeating the exact same register call does not mutate the request incorrectly.

response.error: request_id does not match derived canonical request id

events.comment: Security check proving the watcher recomputes and validates request_id instead of trusting caller input.

events.stage_summary: Read watcher state before failing the request.
events.comment: Captures the normal submitted state before the test moves the request into an explicit failed terminal state.

events.stage_summary: Transitions the request into failed state.
events.comment: Exercises the explicit failure path used when an off-chain submit attempt is rejected or abandoned.

response.error: receipt is not available for failed request

events.stage_summary: Receipt surface for a failed request.
events.comment: Confirms receipt service exposes failure trust-state correctly without pretending the request finalized.

response.error: failed request cannot move to included

events.stage_summary: Watcher blocks included on a failed request.
events.comment: Guards the state machine against illegal resurrection from failed to included.

response.error: terminal request cannot accept new anchor mutations

events.stage_summary: Watcher blocks anchor updates on a failed request.
events.comment: Guards the state machine against mutating a terminal failed request.
Shows how the failed request appears through the audit record endpoint.

events.stage_summary: Audit proof chain for failed request.
events.comment: Shows the proof-chain representation of a failed request, including failure-state metadata.
Confirms the failed request is still discoverable through audit search surfaces.

events.stage_summary: Prepare the main live single request.
events.comment: Ingress produces the canonicalized single payload and the exact submit action that will be broadcast on-chain.

events.stage_summary: Register the single request in watcher.
events.comment: Stores the request so finality, receipt, and audit services can follow the live on-chain transaction.

response.error: receipt is not available before finality

events.comment: Shows the pending trust-state before the live submit transaction is broadcast and verified.
The actual on-chain write that creates the commitment on Jungle4.
Confirms the commitment exists in the verification contract table before finality processing completes.

events.stage_summary: Attach chain anchor metadata to the request.
events.comment: Adds commitment identifiers and chain-facing metadata to the watcher state.

events.stage_summary: Mark the single transaction as included.
events.comment: Supplies tx and block metadata so the watcher can verify inclusion and wait for finality.
Runs the poller over outstanding requests and advances any whose transactions are now verifiable/finalized.
Shows the watcher record once the request has reached finalized_verified trust-state.

events.stage_summary: Final receipt for the single request.
events.comment: Confirms a full receipt is only exposed once inclusion is verified and the block is irreversible.

events.stage_summary: Audit record for the single request.
events.comment: Human-readable aggregate view of the single request after successful finalization.

events.stage_summary: Proof chain for the single request.
events.comment: Detailed chain-of-events view from prepare through verified finality for the single flow.
Confirms audit lookup works from on-chain identifiers back to the off-chain request context.
Confirms audit lookup works from transaction hash back to the finalized request.
Confirms the correlation key derived at prepare time resolves to the same finalized request.

events.stage_summary: Search result for the single request.
events.comment: Confirms the finalized single request appears in normal paginated search results.

events.comment: Checks the export-oriented JSONL surface for the finalized single request.
Creates a request used to prove quorum policy does not over-trust a partially available provider set.
Stores the request under a stricter verification policy that needs more than one successful provider.
Creates a real on-chain commitment while one of the configured providers remains intentionally unavailable.

events.stage_summary: Read the on-chain row for quorum test.
events.comment: Confirms the chain write succeeded even though the verification policy should stay degraded.

events.stage_summary: Attach anchor metadata for the quorum test.
events.comment: Stores identifiers needed for later receipt and audit assertions.

response.inclusion_verification_error: verification policy 'quorum' requires 2 successful providers, got 1

events.stage_summary: Attempt inclusion verification under degraded providers.
events.comment: Shows the watcher has chain metadata but still cannot satisfy its configured provider quorum.

response.inclusion_verification_error: verification policy 'quorum' requires 2 successful providers, got 1

events.comment: Confirms the request remains included_unverified instead of being upgraded prematurely.

response.error: receipt is not available before finality
response.inclusion_verification_error: verification policy 'quorum' requires 2 successful providers, got 1

events.stage_summary: Receipt remains unavailable under degraded quorum.
events.comment: Confirms receipt service refuses to emit a final receipt when quorum verification is not satisfied.

record.inclusion_verification_error: verification policy 'quorum' requires 2 successful providers, got 1

details.verification_error: verification policy 'quorum' requires 2 successful providers, got 1

events.stage_summary: Audit chain for degraded quorum request.
events.comment: Shows the audit view of a real chain write that is deliberately held below the verified trust threshold.

events.stage_summary: Register request used for restart/recovery drill.
events.comment: Sets up a fresh request that will be included, then followed across multiple container restarts.
Creates the chain record that must survive watcher, receipt, audit, and ingress restarts.
Captures the request once included but before restart recovery proves durable state and resumption logic.

payload.stderr:
Container denotary-finality Restarting 
 Container denotary-finality Started

events.stage_summary: Compose restart command for finality service.
events.comment: Operational artifact showing the exact container restart invoked for the watcher.
Confirms watcher comes back on SQLite state with startup recovery information intact.
Core resilience proof: finalized_verified is reached after service interruption and recovery.

payload.stderr:
Container denotary-receipt Restarting 
 Container denotary-receipt Started

events.stage_summary: Compose restart command for receipt service.
events.comment: Operational artifact showing the receipt container restart.
Confirms the read service is healthy again before querying recovered state.
Shows finalized receipt data remains available after restarting the receipt container.

payload.stderr:
Container denotary-audit Restarting 
 Container denotary-audit Started

events.stage_summary: Compose restart command for audit service.
events.comment: Operational artifact showing the audit container restart.
Confirms the audit service is healthy again before querying recovered proof chains.
Shows proof-chain data remains readable after restarting the audit container.

payload.stderr:
Container denotary-ingress Restarting 
 Container denotary-ingress Started

events.stage_summary: Compose restart command for ingress service.
events.comment: Operational artifact showing the ingress container restart.
Confirms the public prepare service is healthy again before testing a fresh handoff.

events.stage_summary: Ingress prepare and watcher handoff after restart.
events.comment: Final resilience check proving ingress still prepares requests and auto-registers them after restart.
Ingress derives leaf hashes, root hash, manifest hash, and the submitroot action for the batch flow.

events.stage_summary: Register the batch request in watcher.
events.comment: Stores the batch request so watcher, receipt, and audit can track the later batch lifecycle.
Creates the batch row on-chain using the computed Merkle root.

events.stage_summary: Read the batch row after submitroot.
events.comment: Confirms the batch row exists before manifest linkage and closure continue.
Links the manifest hash to the open batch so it can later be closed.
Closes the batch after manifest linkage, completing the on-chain batch lifecycle.
Stores batch-specific anchor metadata such as batch_id before finality processing.

events.stage_summary: Mark batch submitroot transaction as included.
events.comment: Supplies the canonical submitroot tx/block metadata that watcher verifies and finalizes for the batch request.
Shows the watcher record once the batch request has reached finalized_verified trust-state.

events.stage_summary: Final receipt for the batch request.
events.comment: Confirms the batch receipt is exposed only after verified finality, just like the single flow.

events.stage_summary: Audit record for the batch request.
events.comment: Human-readable aggregate view of the finalized batch request.

events.stage_summary: Proof chain for the batch request.
events.comment: Detailed chain-of-events view from batch prepare through verified finality.
Confirms audit lookup works from the on-chain batch identifier back to the off-chain request context.

events.stage_summary: Lookup by external_ref_hash for the batch.
events.comment: Confirms the batch correlation key resolves to the same finalized request.

events.stage_summary: Search result for the batch request.
events.comment: Confirms the finalized batch request appears in audit search results.

log_guide: Each file now includes request_kind, request_label, stage_summary, and comment so the resilience drill can be read as a narrated scenario instead of raw event dumps.

reading_order.label: Environment and health
reading_order.comment: Baseline context plus health checks for ingress, finality, receipt, and audit.

reading_order.label: Governance setup
reading_order.comment: Creates the schema and the single/batch policies used by the rest of the drill.

reading_order.label: Ingress public surface
reading_order.comment: Exercises default/debug prepare behavior, validation, and watcher auto-registration handoff.

reading_order.label: Failure-state surface
reading_order.comment: Covers auth, idempotency, request_id integrity, explicit failure handling, and audit/receipt visibility for failed requests.

reading_order.label: Live single flow
reading_order.comment: Runs a full single request from prepare through verified finality and receipt/audit lookups.

reading_order.label: Degraded quorum flow
reading_order.comment: Shows a real chain write that remains below the verified trust threshold because provider quorum is not met.

reading_order.label: Compose restart and recovery
reading_order.comment: Restarts finality, receipt, audit, and ingress containers while proving state recovery from SQLite.

reading_order.label: Live batch flow
reading_order.comment: Runs a full batch request from prepare through submitroot, manifest linkage, closebatch, verified finality, and audit reads.
